title: Project Overview
description: Start with the README to understand the Business OS architecture — a modular platform integrating ERP Modular, TikTok UGC Studio, Etsy Wizard, Inner Monologue AI agent, and bridge integrations.

title: System Architecture
description: ARCHITECTURE.md describes the service layering, Bridge Server integration, and how Plane, Planka, BookStack, and OpenObserve connect.

title: Project Status & Roadmap
description: STATUS.md tracks current development state, active modules, and future roadmap for all Business OS components.

title: Core Platform — ERP Modular Entry Point
description: The ERP Modular service is the central API gateway (port 8102). FastAPI app with CRUD entity management, template rendering, auth, rate limiting, and subscription plans.

title: ERP Modular — API Gateway & Auth
description: API Gateway with reverse proxy routing, JWT + RBAC authentication, token-bucket rate limiting, and a FastAPI CRUD router for modules, templates, and entities.

title: ERP Modular — Core Engine & Plugins
description: Database session management, plugin system with abstract base classes, and Jinja2 template engine for rendering.

title: TikTok UGC Studio — Content Generation Pipeline
description: Main service for automated social media content. Micro service entry, FFmpeg composer for video assembly, fal.ai client for AI image-to-video, and AI video generation pipeline.

title: TikTok UGC Studio — Script Generation & TTS
description: AI script generator creates compelling TikTok video scripts. gTTS text-to-speech wrapper generates voiceovers. Pipeline variants for affiliate, cartoon, and default content.

title: TikTok UGC Studio — Browser Automation & Posting
description: Playwright-based browser uploader for TikTok, remote auth service for user login flow, VNC auth server for headless environments, and Post For Me integration for social media auto-posting.

title: TikTok UGC Studio — Monitoring & Scout
description: Monitor loop tracks performance and optimizes content strategy. Scout (R&D) provides trend intelligence, viral video analysis, competitor tracking, and content template generation.

title: Etsy Wizard — Listing Automation
description: AI-powered Etsy listing assistant with micro service entry, product detection, image generation, and rules validation for marketplace compliance.

title: Etsy Wizard — Rules & Configuration
description: Etsy marketplace rules for image format, listing content, and policy compliance. Assistant module provides AI-driven listing generation with fix and optimization.

title: Inner Monologue — AI Agent Framework
description: Self-reflective AI agent with sub-agent delegation system, heartbeat monitoring, human-in-the-loop confirmation, persistent memory, and resilience patterns.

title: Inner Monologue — Delegation & Resilience
description: Multi-Agent Delegation System manages sub-agents. Resilience engine provides retry strategies with fallback providers. HITL provides confirmation mode and flag-as-needed workflow.

title: Inner Monologue — Memory, Heartbeat & Scanner
description: Persistent memory with condenser for long-term recall. Heartbeat monitor shows agent status. System Bot Scanner auto-discovers ERP Stack services.

title: Prompt Studio — Prompt Management
description: Centralized prompt management service (port 8107). Loads, versions, and serves AI prompts with loader abstraction layer. Stores UGC prompts for product holding, usage, and review.

title: Bridge Server — Integration Hub
description: Bridge Server connects Plane, Planka, BookStack, and OpenObserve into a unified platform. App entry with settings config and handler modules.

title: Modules — Auth & Media
description: Auth Module handles user registration, login, and OAuth (Google/GitHub). Media Module provides file upload and management service.

title: Modules — Product Analysis Pipeline
description: Product scraper with Playwright + Gemini Vision, analysis pipeline (normalizer → enricher → analyzer), database models for tracking sessions across Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop, Amazon, and more.

title: Infrastructure — Docker Orchestration
description: Docker Compose files orchestrate all services: main stack, Plane, Planka, BookStack, OpenObserve, Siyuan, and network configuration. Multi-Dockerfile for each service.

title: Infrastructure — Deployment & CI/CD
description: GitHub Actions workflows deploy all services. PM2 ecosystem configs manage processes. Aider configuration for AI-assisted development.
